next_steps: Endobronchial ultrasound-guided transbronchial needle aspiration (EBUS-TBNA) of mediastinal lymph nodes
Serum angiotensin-converting enzyme (ACE) and soluble IL-2 receptor levels
Synovial fluid analysis of the affected knee
Tissue biopsy for histopathology, fungal, acid-fast bacilli, and bacterial cultures
Cardiac MRI with gadolinium enhancement and/or PET/CT to evaluate for cardiac sarcoidosis
24-hour Holter monitoring or implantable loop recorder for arrhythmia detection
Endobronchial ultrasound-guided transbronchial needle aspiration (EBUS-TBNA) of mediastinal lymph nodes for culture and histopathology
Serum angiotensin-converting enzyme (ACE), soluble IL-2 receptor, and inflammatory markers (ESR, CRP)
Synovial fluid analysis of the knee to rule out infectious or inflammatory arthropathy
